When we called the store the person on the phone was not apologetic he just said get refund from uber eats we did not ask for a refund to start with

1317981.a: Bargain Booze, 12 Warwick Road, Wellesbourne, Warwick

g_reviews.text:
Excellent service, really friendly staff. Took their time to explain the menu and recommend the dishes.

Went out their way to make my father in laws birthday that bit more special.

Would recommend to friends and family.

Absolutely amazing staff - we wanted to dine in but we couldn't drive cause of a flood on the way and they still delivered to the hotel we were staying. This was all after 10pm. Food was tasty & definitely good value for money with generous potions.
Second year of spending Christmas Day here. Food amazing as always.

We had a wonderful dining experience at this beautiful Indian restaurant. Everything from the warm hospitality to the delicious food and fair pricing was a notch above the rest.

We were warmly welcomed by Kaaz (apologies if the spelling is off), whose hospitality truly set the tone for the evening. The portions were generous and more than enough for our group.

The standout dishes for us were the Dansak, Palak Paneer Masala, and the Lamb Chops each cooked to perfection with rich, distinctive flavors that set them apart. These dishes alone are reason enough to return!

The Tarka Dal, while flavorful, could have used a touch more salt, but that was a minor hiccup in an otherwise excellent meal.

Highly recommend this place for anyone looking to enjoy authentic Indian cuisine with great service and a cozy.

Good food , fresh and the lamb paper
Fried curry is yummy … the meat is tender and the spice is just perfect. Very authentic

We went there for our anniversary and met with very warm welcome and lovely note. We ordered some nibbles and samosa, then lamb chop and sea bass fillet, then tiramisu as dessert. The sauce under the samose was excellent, I wished they put 2 portions into one dish. Fish was very nice and elegant with the sauce, my husband said he loved the lamb chops. I think the highlight was date sponge tiramisu, it was really tasty. It's a bit expensive restaurant but definitely will go again to celebrating or indulging us with good food. Thank you!

Had a great meal a Loxleys. My wife and I both ordered rib eye steaks, one with chips and one with fries and a side order of mushrooms. Steaks were cooked to perfection, with the chips and sides equally tasty. We also had a bottle of 'loxleys' Merlot which was a great accompaniment. Service was great and atmosphere made the entire experience very nice.

We came here for the first time for our 1 year wedding anniversary meal and had a lovely evening. The food, staff and atmosphere were all excellent. They had a full gluten free menu which was very extensive and had several items on you struggle to find as gluten free.
We had the squid and chicken wings (both GF) as starter and the lamb and steak mains.
Would highly recommend for a lovely evening out. Will definitely be coming back!

Prob the best Sunday roast I've ever had! Beef was perfectly cooked, tender, juicy and tasty. Roasted potoes and carrots were out of the world, and yorkies was so well done (fluffy yet with small crunch and absolutely delicious) I wish they'd share the recipe.

I visited Loxleys in Stratford-upon-Avon on Friday night for a romantic dinner with my fiancée, and we had a wonderful evening.

From the moment we walked in, the staff were warm, attentive and genuinely friendly. That level of service stayed consistent throughout the night, which made the whole experience feel relaxed and welcoming.

We ordered the châteaubriand with both peppercorn and Stilton sauce, and it did not disappoint. The steak was cooked perfectly and tasted amazing - one of the best we’ve had.

The atmosphere was lovely too, exactly what we wanted for a romantic dinner. Unfortunately, a nearby customer spent quite a bit of time loudly on a phone call, which did take away from the mood a little, though of course that was out of the restaurant’s control.

Overall, it was a lovely evening with great food and excellent service. We’d definitely return next time we’re in the area.

We went with our dog and were seated in the cozy, pet-friendly section by the door — love when places are dog-friendly! 🐾
The staff were super attentive, and the food? Absolutely bursting with flavor.
Highly recommend the crispy pork & mango salad — sweet, tangy, crunchy perfection.

Vintner provided great pre-theatre service helped us get to our showing on time.

I had the vegan risotto, which was solid and what I was looking for. There was a set menu which offered a good selection, but we opted for fewer courses.

The staff were attentive throughout, checking in at the right moments. Everything moved smoothly, which made the visit easy and enjoyable.

Vintner works well as a place to eat before a show, and I would return.

Great little joint, had the Beef Rump and a Sticky Toffee Pudding and both were fantastic and good for the price. Just the rump was a little cheap but cooked perfectly, 4.5 for food. The service was exceptional, the waitress was very friendly and polite and very helpful, 5 for service. The atmosphere was also fantastic, very cute and quiet, no gross music, 5 for atmosphere

This was our second visit to The Vinter, & it didn’t disappoint! We come to Stratford several times a year to visit the RSC. The Vintner does a set menu, which is excellent for pre-theatre dining. You can choose either two or three courses, available at certain times. The Vintner is an independent, family run restaurant, which is very popular & always seems busy, situated on Sheep Street. We pre-booked online (would recommend pre booking, especially weekends) & advised of my ND. When we arrived we, they were very busy. They sat us at a table that was near a staircase. It made me feel very uncomfortable, as I felt it was an area of high ‘people traffic’. Hubs asked if there was an alternate table. We were then moved to a different table, & then moved again as they realised the second table was booked by someone else in forty minutes. Our final table was lovely, & by a window, which helps me as it gives me a focus to distract me when I get anxious. Our server was very apologetic & kept asking if we were okay. We reassured her we were. I’m not sure if the notes had transferred from the OpenTable booking app or not, or whether they hadn’t been checked initially. We then ordered our food. I chose Cauliflower & Gruyère Cheese Mousse & hubs ordered Lamb Koftas with Giant Couscous & Tzatziki to start. We both thoroughly enjoyed them! My cheese mousse was delicious! We both ordered the same main course; Breast of Chicken, marinated in Lemon & Tarragon with tenderstem broccoli, mashed potatoes & white wine sauce. The chicken was still on the bone, the skin crispy & the meat, moist & juicy. It was scrumptious! We both ordered the Cherry & Almond tart with custard for dessert. It was a generous portion, & again, gorgeous. The last meal we had here was in January & the menu was different, so it looks like it’s updated regularly. (We had a cottage pie previously) The restaurant is lovely & the food, perfect. Apart from the slight glitch at the start, which was more than made up for after with the level of service throughout our visit, we would highly recommend The Vintner if you’re in Stratford! (We did forget photos as we were so engrossed in the meal, so the ones on the review may have a few bites taken already!)
What a lovely delightful restaurant.  Great choice of "Sharable" starters with very friendly staff especially Charlie.

503480.alias_source: Exact FSA name match (pre-existing Rankable-A venue)

g_reviews.text:
Takeaway only, no dine in option.

Food is excellent, fresh produce (fresh salad/sides, etc), well spiced and served piping hot.     Extensive menu and above all, everything tasted great.

I was staying in a nearby hotel overnight and brought the food back to my room, so if staying in Stratford and don't want to use the bland hotel menus, then this is worth a visit.

Honestly the best Indian in Stratford! Never had a bad meal. A lot of places are hit and miss but not this place. Curries nice and thick sauce and the delivery guys are super friendly and always bring up to my flat for me. Lamb tikka makhani is amazing!
The BEST takeaway in Stratford, absolutely gorgeous food and happy smiling staff. No need to order from anywhere else. Thank you. The Real Ron 👍🙏

Ordered through just eat and found glass in my food, ordered before and has always been amazing however really not happy about this and when I tried to contacting them they said there was nothing they could do (contacted through just eat)
We always have great food from Simla!  Definitely our favourite Indian takeaway in Stratford-on-Avon! The drivers are very professional and very friendly! Great value for money too.
